title: Medieval Kingdom Armors
description: This mod adds medieval themed armors to minecraft. Good for roleplaying.
body:
Medieval Kingdon Armor is a Minecraft mod that brings a rich selection of historically inspired medieval gear to enhance your survival and combat experience. This mod introduces a variety of armor sets, ranging from rugged leather brigandines to full plate armor, each offering unique protection and aesthetics. Whether you're a knight defending your castle or a rogue adventurer exploring the world, this mod provides the perfect tools to immerse yourself in medieval warfare.  

List of Armors:

Kings Armor
Prince Armor
Nobelman Armor

Kings Guard Armor
Vanguard Armor
Knight Armor
Infantryman Armor
